infoPlist.NSHealthShareUsageDescription: One Rep Max reads metrics such as heart rate, activity, sleep, and weight from Apple Health to show them on your dashboard.
infoPlist.NSHealthUpdateUsageDescription: One Rep Max can save health or workout data you choose to write to Apple Health.

plugins.NSHealthShareUsageDescription: One Rep Max reads metrics such as heart rate, activity, sleep, and weight from Apple Health to show them on your dashboard.
plugins.NSHealthUpdateUsageDescription: One Rep Max can save health or workout data you choose to write to Apple Health.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Allow $(PRODUCT_NAME) to use your location to show where you are on the map.
